sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of Yiren Digital ...
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has launched an investigation into Yiren Digital Ltd. (NYSE: YRD) following a significant decline in its stock price. The investigation concerns potential securities fraud or unlawful business practices by Yiren's officers and/or directors, stemming from a reported decline in fourth-quarter revenue, a net loss, and increased delinquent loan rates attributed to regulatory changes, reduced loan facilitation, and a higher-risk asset profile. Investors are encouraged to contact Pomerantz LLP to learn more about joining a potential class action.

feed.title: ZAP Technical Analysis & Stock Price Forecast
feed.summary: This article provides a technical analysis of Global X U.S. Electrification ETF (ZAP), indicating a "Neutral" overall consensus based on aggregated technical signals. It examines various indicators like MACD, RSI, and moving averages, with ZAP's current share price of $32.16 trading above several simple moving averages, leading to "Buy" signals for those specific indicators. Despite several indicators pointing to "Neutral" status, the article highlights key support and resistance levels and evaluates the stock's performance relative to its 200-day moving average.

feed.title: Alexanders amends Bloomberg lease at 731 Lexington Avenue with rent abatement
feed.summary: Alexanders Inc. has amended its lease agreement with Bloomberg L.P. for the office condominium at 731 Lexington Avenue, New York City. The amendment includes a rent abatement of $56,808,900 for Bloomberg in exchange for a corresponding reduction in Bloomberg's tenant improvement fund. Despite these changes, Bloomberg continues to lease the entire office condominium, and the lease expiration date remains February 8, 2040.

feed.title: [8-K] ALEXANDERS INC Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Alexander's, Inc. (ALX) has filed an 8-K report detailing a material event where it amended Bloomberg L.P.'s long-term lease at 731 Lexington Avenue. The amendment grants Bloomberg a rent abatement of $56,808,900 for April 1 to December 1, 2026, offset by an equivalent reduction in Bloomberg's tenant improvement fund. A related loan agreement was also amended to create a free rent reserve account to cover debt service during the abatement period, ensuring Alexander's cash flow stability.

feed.title: AMC SEC Filings - Amc Entmt Hldgs Inc 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides comprehensive access to AMC Entertainment Holdings Inc. (AMC) SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K forms, and insider trading reports, alongside AI-powered summaries and sentiment analysis. Recent filings highlight director equity grants as part of a compensation program, a significant debt restructuring plan involving new notes and a term loan, and the company's 2025 financial performance showing increased revenue but deeper net losses. AMC also details its heavy debt load and warns of the speculative nature of its common stock, with a recent report indicating Pentwater Capital Management LP has exited its beneficial ownership.

feed.title: Amrize appoints Baris Oran as CFO; Ian Johnston to senior advisor
feed.summary: Amrize has announced the appointment of Baris Oran as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective April 1, 2026. Ian Johnston, the outgoing CFO, will transition to a senior advisor role and will be on garden leave until March 31, 2027, to support the transition. The change is not related to any disagreements regarding financial controls or operations.

feed.title: Alkermes Shares Surge 15% Following Lilly-Centessa Deal
feed.summary: Alkermes shares surged 15% following Eli Lilly's acquisition of Centessa, driven by market optimism for its sleep disorder prospects and its developing orexin 2 receptor drug. Clinical trial progress for Alkermes' alixorexton showed significant improvements in wakefulness, attracting large pharma interest. RBC Capital assigned an 'Outperform' rating with a $45 price target, while retail investor sentiment shifted from 'neutral' to 'bullish' on Stocktwits.

feed.title: Candescent Enables Tap to Pay on iPhone for Small Businesses at Zions Bancorporation with Autobooks
feed.summary: Candescent has partnered with Zions Bancorporation and Autobooks to introduce Tap to Pay on iPhone for Zions' small business customers. This solution enables secure, in-person, contactless payments directly within the mobile banking experience, eliminating the need for extra hardware. The integration aims to simplify payment acceptance and provide small businesses with a comprehensive view of their finances through existing invoicing, accounting, and cash flow tools within digital banking.

feed.title: ALDX Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Aldeyra Therapeutics, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Aldeyra Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALDX) for alleged securities fraud between November 3, 2023, and March 16, 2026. Investors who purchased Aldeyra securities during this period and suffered losses are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss their rights and potentially lead the lawsuit. The complaint asserts that Aldeyra made false and misleading statements regarding inconsistencies in clinical trials for its reproxalap drug candidate, causing investor damages.

feed.title: Aldeyra (NASDAQ: ALDX) grants CEO 1.88M options and bonus units
feed.summary: Aldeyra Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALDX) CEO Todd C. Brady was granted 1,880,510 stock options with an exercise price of $1.77 per share and 632,318 bonus units. These awards are part of his compensation package and are subject to vesting schedules contingent on continuous service to the company. The stock options vest monthly over 48 months, and the bonus units vest annually over four years, with the vested units entitling him to a cash payment based on the common stock's closing price.

feed.title: Director-linked funds add 75K Zenas BioPharma (ZBIO) shares at $20 in offering
feed.summary: Entities linked to Zenas BioPharma director Hongbo Lu purchased 75,000 shares of common stock at $20.00 each through an underwritten public offering, bringing their indirect holdings to 422,968 shares. This transaction, detailed in a Form 4 filing, reflects a significant insider buy within Zenas BioPharma (ZBIO). The reporting person disclaims beneficial ownership beyond any pecuniary interest.

feed.title: YJ PE Ratio & Valuation, Is YJ Overvalued

feed.title: 22nd Century (XXII) registers $250M shelf; Needham ATM up to $1.84M
feed.summary: 22nd Century Group, Inc. (XXII) has filed a shelf registration statement to offer up to $250 million in various securities, including debt, common stock, preferred stock, warrants, subscription rights, securities purchase contracts, and units. The filing also includes an amendment to its at-the-market (ATM) sales agreement with Needham & Company, LLC, allowing for the sale of up to $1.84 million in common stock. As of March 26, 2026, the company reported 721,338 shares of common stock outstanding at a price of $2.94 per share.

feed.title: ZenaTech (ZENA) Chief Technology Officer Asif Sajjad files initial Form 3
feed.summary: ZenaTech (ZENA) Chief Technology Officer Asif Sajjad has filed an initial Form 3, disclosing his beneficial ownership of securities. This filing establishes his status as an insider, but it indicates no stock transactions or derivative positions at this time. The Form 3 serves as a baseline for future reporting of his ownership changes.

feed.title: YD Bio launches telehealth platform for cancer detection By Investing.com
feed.summary: YD Bio Limited has announced the launch of its EG Telehealth Platform in collaboration with EG BioMed Co., Ltd., expanding cancer detection and monitoring services across 44 U.S. states, Washington, D.C., and Guam. This platform combines YD Bio's digital health infrastructure with EG BioMed's laboratory capabilities to screen for various cancers, including pancreatic, colorectal, liver, gastrointestinal, and breast cancers. The launch is a step towards scalable deployment, coinciding with YD Bio's ongoing plans to merge with EG BioMed and recent acquisitions to enhance its technological capabilities.

feed.title: Exzeo Group (XZO) CEO buys 2,000 shares, holds major option grant
feed.summary: Exzeo Group, Inc. CEO Paresh Patel purchased 2,000 shares of common stock in an open-market transaction at $14.08 per share, increasing his direct holdings to 1,592,013 shares. Additionally, Mr. Patel holds a stock option granted in October 2021 to buy 5,000,000 common shares at an exercise price of $23.00, which vests periodically until its expiration in October 2031. This insider activity indicates confidence from the CEO in the company's future prospects.

feed.title: X Financial Sponsored ADR (NYSE:XYF) Sees Large Decline in Short Interest
feed.summary: X Financial Sponsored ADR (NYSE:XYF) experienced a significant 15.0% decline in short interest during March, falling to 133,058 shares. This resulted in a short-interest ratio of 1.2 days based on average daily trading volume. While institutional ownership remains low at 1.15%, several firms like Russell Investments, BNP Paribas, Jump Financial, and the NJ Police & Firemen’s Retirement System recently initiated or increased their stakes in the company.

feed.title: Yimutian (YMT) GM Deng Xu discloses 9,987,000 fully vested options
feed.summary: Yimutian Inc.'s GM, Deng Xu, reported an initial ownership of 9,987,000 fully vested stock options (Form 3 filing). These options allow him to purchase Class A ordinary shares at an exercise price of $0.01 per share, expiring on December 4, 2035. The filing records an existing option position and does not indicate any recent share purchases or sales.

feed.title: Wytec International Delays Filing of 2025 Annual Report
feed.summary: Wytec International, Inc. (WYTC) announced a delay in filing its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025, due to internal financial reporting review delays. The company expects to file within 15 calendar days and does not anticipate significant changes in its results of operations. This marks a pattern of filing delays for Wytec, which investors are advised to monitor.

feed.title: TeraWulf Inc. Trade Ideas — MUN:ZT8

The ideas discuss potential price targets, bullish and bearish scenarios, and support/resistance levels based on technical indicators like Elliott Wave theory, Wyckoff accumulation, and chart patterns such as cup & handle and triangular patterns. Many analyses highlight the stock's potential upside given its connection to Bitcoin mining and its eco-friendly operations, while also acknowledging risks and the importance of specific technical levels.

feed.title: XOMA (XOMA) director exercises options, holds 9,234 common shares after trade
feed.summary: XOMA Royalty Corp director Joseph M. Limber exercised stock options to acquire 3,026 shares of common stock at $11.20 per share. These options had been fully vested since July 21, 2017, and are now fully exercised. Following this transaction, Mr. Limber directly holds 9,234 shares of common stock, 20,000 depositary shares of 8.375% Series B cumulative stock, and 10,000 shares of 8.625% Series A cumulative perpetual preferred stock.

feed.title: Wintrust (WTFC) founder has 5,929 shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Wintrust Financial founder and senior advisor Edward J. Wehmer reported a tax-withholding disposition of 5,929 shares of common stock on March 27, 2026, valued at $132.98 per share. These shares were used to satisfy tax obligations rather than being sold in the open market. Following this transaction, Wehmer directly holds 168,742 common shares and has additional indirect holdings through his spouse and a 401(k) plan, along with direct and indirect holdings of Series F Preferred Stock.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum Hits Day High with Strong 4.89% Intraday Surge
feed.summary: Marathon Petroleum Corp. saw a significant intraday surge of 4.89% on March 24, 2026, reaching a high of USD 247.00, contrasting with the S&P 500's decline. The company has demonstrated robust performance over the past year, month, and year-to-date, far outperforming the S&P 500. This strong market capitalization, return on equity, and dividend yield highlight its financial health and operational efficiency within the oil industry.

feed.title: Aegon to propose extension of the term of Lard Friese as CEO
feed.summary: Aegon's Board of Directors will propose extending the term of Lard Friese as CEO and Executive Director until 2030 at the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders on June 10, 2026. This extension aims to provide leadership continuity during the company's relocation to the US and its strategy to become a leading US life insurance and retirement group. The Board expressed full confidence in Friese's ability to execute Aegon's strategy and create long-term value.

feed.title: Workhorse Group Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Workhorse Group reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings, highlighting the completion of its merger with Motiv Electric Trucks. The company outlined its strategy to achieve profitability by focusing on cost synergies, expanding its product portfolio, and strengthening its financial position, targeting cash flow breakeven by the end of 2028 through a modest market share of 1% or 2,500 vehicles annually. Despite continued financial challenges, including negative gross margins and net losses in Q4 2025, the company expressed confidence in its existing manufacturing capacity and a clear path to make its electric trucks competitive with internal combustion engine vehicles in terms of pricing and total cost of ownership.

feed.title: WORLD KINECT (NYSE: WKC) President settles RSUs with 2,604 shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: WORLD KINECT CORP President John Peter Rau had 2,604 shares withheld for taxes on March 28, 2026, stemming from the vesting and settlement of 7,814 restricted stock units. The shares were valued at $23.36 each, the closing price on March 27, 2026. Following this transaction, Rau directly holds 192,837 shares of the company's common stock.

feed.title: WORLD KINECT (WKC) CEO has RSUs vest, shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: WORLD KINECT CORP's CEO, Ira M. Birns, reported a routine tax-withholding transaction where 2,741 shares of common stock were withheld to cover the tax liability from 7,814 vested restricted stock units. The shares were valued at $23.36 each. Following this transaction, Birns directly holds 269,409 shares of the company.

feed.title: Wheaton Precious Metals (NYSE: WPM) files Form 40-F and sets 2026 shareholder meeting
feed.summary: Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. has filed its Form 40-F report and 2025 audited financial statements with the SEC, which are available on EDGAR and the company's website. The company will hold its Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders on May 8, 2026, at 1:30 p.m. Eastern Time, both virtually and in-person at the Conrad Hotel New York Downtown. Registered shareholders and duly appointed proxyholders can participate and vote online, while guests can listen but not vote or ask questions.

feed.title: Wheaton Precious Metals Provides Details of Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders and Files Form 40-F
feed.summary: Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. announced the filing of its Form 40-F report with the SEC and provided details for its Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders. The meeting will be held virtually and in-person on Friday, May 8, 2026, at 1:30 p.m. Eastern Time, allowing shareholders to participate and vote online or attend in New York. The company also highlighted its business model as a premier precious metals streaming company focused on strong ESG practices.

feed.title: VTS (NYSE) insider sells 70,142 shares; multiple 2026 dispositions
feed.summary: Vitesse Energy (NYSE: VTS) recently reported insider share sales, including a proposed sale of 50,000 shares and multiple dispositions by Brian Cree between January and March 2026. The largest single sale by Cree involved 70,142 shares for over $1.3 million on March 31, 2026, handled by Wells Fargo Clearing Services. These transactions are considered routine dispositions, and further details on holdings or plans may be provided in subsequent filings.

feed.summary: WEX, Inc. has recently formed a Death Cross, a technical indicator suggesting a potential bearish trend. The stock has underperformed the S&P 500 significantly over the past year, and its daily moving averages and MACD indicators further reinforce a bearish outlook. Investors are advised to exercise caution due to these challenging market conditions.

feed.title: US Foods (NYSE: USFD) CFO sale, large gift and trust transfers
feed.summary: US Foods Holding Corp. EVP and CFO Dirk J. Locascio engaged in several stock transactions on March 30, 2026. He sold 20,000 shares of USFD stock at $91.19 per share under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Additionally, Locascio made a bona fide gift of 85,464 shares and transferred 42,732 shares to each of two separate living trusts.

feed.title: Vision Marine Locks In 2026 Output as Commercial Demand for Electric Boats Surges
feed.summary: Vision Marine Technologies has announced that its 2026 electric boat production is largely committed due to increasing commercial and retail demand across various markets. The company attributes this to recurring orders from fleet operators and expanded distribution through Nautical Ventures, strengthening its position in the electric boating sector. Despite this demand, TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark gives VMAR a "Neutral" rating due to weak financial quality and bearish technicals.

feed.title: Wayfair (NYSE: W) director updates holdings after 56,000-share transfer
feed.summary: Wayfair Inc. director Michael Andrew Kumin reported updated equity holdings and a new stock award. He received 3,176 shares of Class A Common Stock as restricted stock units, which will vest quarterly starting May 1, 2026. Additionally, 56,000 shares previously held by TOF Capital were transferred to his direct individual ownership, bringing his total direct beneficial ownership to 319,753 shares.

feed.title: Santander (WBS) files merger pact, seeks OCC approval for bank merger
feed.summary: Santander Holdings USA, Inc. has filed agreement documents and regulatory filings for Banco Santander’s proposed acquisition of Webster Financial Corporation, including a bank-level merger. An Agreement and Plan of Merger was executed on March 30, 2026, and Santander Bank, N.A. submitted a Bank Merger Act application to the OCC for approval. The bank merger is contingent upon the closing of the HoldCo Transactions and the necessary regulatory approvals.

feed.title: VolitionRX (VNRX) Rating Maintained as Buy by D. Boral Capital
feed.summary: Analyst Jason Kolbert from D. Boral Capital has maintained a 'Buy' rating for VolitionRX (VNRX) with an unchanged price target of $3.00 USD. This reiteration reflects consistent confidence in the company's prospects, with historical ratings showing a steady 'Buy' status. The average target price from 5 analysts is $2.06, suggesting a significant upside of 984.21% from the current price, while GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $1.40 for VNRX.

feed.title: Catheter Precision (NYSE: VTAK) posts 2025 loss, revenue up 95% and buys Flyte aviation unit
feed.summary: Catheter Precision (NYSE: VTAK) reported a 95% revenue increase in 2025, reaching $819 thousand, but posted a GAAP net loss of $17.7 million. Despite the growth, the company highlights significant liquidity risks, stating it needs additional financing to fund operations through fiscal year 2026. VTAK has also strategically diversified by acquiring Flyte, a regional air mobility company, creating two distinct operating platforms in medical devices and aviation.

feed.summary: Vroom, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRM) experienced a significant 20.9% increase in short interest during March, reaching 48,536 shares, representing 0.9% of the stock. The company reported negative earnings per share and net margin, alongside a high debt-to-equity ratio, with institutional investors holding approximately 25.8% of the shares.

feed.title: [6-K] Viking Holdings Ltd Current Report (Foreign Issuer) | VIK SEC Filing - Form 6-K
feed.summary: Viking Holdings Ltd has scheduled its 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders for May 13, 2026, to be held virtually. Shareholders will vote on director nominees, the appointment of Torstein Hagen as Chairman, and the reappointment of Ernst & Young AS as auditor. The company reported strong financial performance for 2025 with $6.5 billion in revenue, a 7.4% increase in Net Yields, and 38.8% growth in Adjusted EBITDA.

feed.title: V F Corp (VFC) director defers fees into 1,524 phantom stock units
feed.summary: V F Corp director Mark Samuel Hoplamazian acquired 1,524.390 phantom stock units by deferring director fees. These units, valued at $16.40 each, track the value of V F Corp common stock and will be settled in cash upon his retirement. Following this transaction, Hoplamazian holds a total of 29,225.0621 phantom stock units.

feed.title: V F Corp (VFC) director defers fees into 1,905 phantom stock units
feed.summary: V F Corp director Matthew J. Shattock has increased his deferred compensation by acquiring 1,905.488 phantom stock units. These units, which track VF's share price and dividends, were credited at $16.40 per unit as part of his director fees and will be settled in cash upon his retirement. This transaction increased his total phantom stock holdings under the company's Directors Deferred Savings Plan to 41,402.862 units.

feed.title: Valmont Industries, Inc. Announces Timing of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Valmont Industries, Inc. will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, April 21, 2026, before market open. A webcast and conference call will follow at 8:00 a.m. CT with President and CEO Avner M. Applbaum and CFO Thomas Liguori to discuss the results. Participants can join via phone or webcast, with a replay available until April 28, 2026.
